description: You are an 8th-grade Earth Science teacher at an OLPC-equipped school preparing a climate change lesson. Create a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/generate_climate_bars.py that reads the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/gistemp_anomalies.csv (Headers: Source, Year, Mean) and generates an HTML visualization at /home/ga/Documents/climate_bars.html. The HTML file must feature the heading 'Global Temperature Anomalies' and a horizontal bar chart for the years 1900 through 2016. Each year must have a bar with a width proportional to the absolute value of the Mean anomaly, colored blue for negative values (< 0) and red for positive or zero values (>= 0). The Year and Mean value must be displayed as text near each bar.
